---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem or motivation**
Describe the problem this feature would solve or the motivation behind it.

**Proposed solution**
A clear description of what you would like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you have considered.

**Additional context**
Any other information, examples, or references that support this request.
